nasb.text: Now let them put away their harlotry and the corpses of their kings far from Me; and I will dwell among them forever.

esv.text: Now let them put away their whoring and the dead bodies of their kings far from me, and I will dwell in their midst forever.

cnv.text: 現在他們要從我面前除去淫亂和他們諸王的石碑，我就住在他們中間，直到永遠。

ccb.text: 现在，他们要停止祭拜偶像和他们死去的君王，我就永远住在他们当中。
